title: VC Availability
description: a resource pack for henkelmax's status mod that changes the recording and streaming statuses to voice chat availability
body:
a simple resource pack that changes the "Recording" and "Streaming" statuses in [henkelmax](https://modrinth.com/user/henkelmax)'s [Status](https://modrinth.com/mod/status) mod to "Unable to Voice" and "Open to Voice", intended for use with [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat).

![A screenshot of the status menu in game. It looks the same as normal, but the two buttons in the second catgeory that used to say Recording and Streaming now say Unable to VOice and Open to Voice. The color of Open to Voice is green, as opposed to Streaming's purple.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99c76548263ed243890608739d6258649e89b4e0_0.webp)

the icon is literally just Simple Voice Chat's icon on top of Status's icon
